name: elite-longterm-memory
tagline: ClawHub (227★): Ultimate AI agent memory system for Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT & Copilot. WAL protocol + vector search + git-notes + cloud bac
verdict: A maintenance step deletes paths under your home directory, flagged only as a '(nuclear option)' with no explicit confirmation gate before it runs -- a wrong path or a misfire wipes real files. The description is generic marketing copy that never says when to invoke it, or when not to, raising accidental-trigger risk.

highlights.summary: Home-directory path deletion listed under Maintenance Commands with only a "(nuclear option)" inline label and no explicit user-confirmation gate immediately before the step; criti
Description is a feature/product blurb; it never states concrete situations or phrasings that would tell a dispatching agent WHEN to invoke it.
No "NOT for" / out-of-scope / "instead use" language appears anywhere in the description or body.
